neural_meta_desc: The intelligence behind your growth. Powered by Gemini, the Neural OS analyzes your habits, finances, and goals to provide personalized insights and audits.
neural_hero_desc: Beyond just a tracker. OneForMind's Neural OS uses advanced AI to analyze your behavioral patterns, identifying friction points and suggesting high-impact adjustments in real-time.
neural_mockup_insight_1: Peak Cognitive Load detected at 2 PM.
neural_mockup_insight_2: Suggesting: Move 'Journaling' to 8 PM for higher completion rate.
neural_audit_desc: Most habits fail due to invisible friction. Our AI audits your logs to find exactly where and why you stall, providing tactical solutions to break through stagnation.
neural_audit_step1_desc: Neural OS identifies subtle drops in consistency before they become permanent failures.
neural_audit_step2_desc: Cross-reference your environment and mood to see how they impact your execution.
neural_synergy_desc: Your finances impact your stress, and your stress impacts your habits. Neural OS connects these data points to show you the 'Big Picture' of your personal evolution.
neural_synergy_fin_desc: Understand how your spending habits correlate with your focus and daily energy levels.
neural_synergy_hab_desc: See how building small wins in habits translates into better financial discipline and clarity.
neural_coach_desc: Chat with an intelligence that knows your goals even better than you do. The AI Coach provides context-aware guidance based on your real performance data.
neural_privacy_desc: Neural OS is built with 'Zero-Trust' principles. Your personal data is used to provide insights to you, and only you. We never sell your data or use it to train global models.
neural_cta_title: Step into the Future of Focus.
neural_cta_desc: Join thousands of users who are using Neural OS to eliminate chaos and build intentional lives.
neural_gemini_feat1: Real-time behavior analysis across all features.
neural_gemini_feat2: Privacy-focused data processing with local-first logic.
neural_gemini_feat3: Seamless integration with Habits, Jobs, and Goals.
neural_coach_msg1: I noticed you're 20% more likely to execute habits when your morning mood is 'Excited'. Want me to move your high-energy tasks there?
neural_coach_msg3: Done! Your Planner has been updated for maximum flow.
